'''鈭歝h-w-z''' ('''kachawaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yartz|yartz]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-w-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yartz|yartz]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-w-z
|-
! Lemma
| kachawaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichawaz|thichawaz]] || [[word:jichawaz|jichawaz]] || [[word:shichawaz|shichawaz]] || [[word:kichawaz|kichawaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchawaz|thuthuchawaz]] || [[word:jujuchawaz|jujuchawaz]] || [[word:shushuchawaz|shushuchawaz]] || [[word:kukuchawaz|kukuchawaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchawaz|thuchawaz]] || [[word:juchawaz|juchawaz]] || [[word:shuchawaz|shuchawaz]] || [[word:kuchawaz|kuchawaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchawaz|thuchawaz]] || [[word:juchawaz|juchawaz]] || [[word:shuchawaz|shuchawaz]] || [[word:kuchawaz|kuchawaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechawaz|thechawaz]] || [[word:jechawaz|jechawaz]] || [[word:shechawaz|shechawaz]] || [[word:kechawaz|kechawaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochawaz|thothochawaz]] || [[word:jojochawaz|jojochawaz]] || [[word:shoshochawaz|shoshochawaz]] || [[word:kokochawaz|kokochawaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochawaz|thochawaz]] || [[word:jochawaz|jochawaz]] || [[word:shochawaz|shochawaz]] || [[word:kochawaz|kochawaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochawaz|thochawaz]] || [[word:jochawaz|jochawaz]] || [[word:shochawaz|shochawaz]] || [[word:kochawaz|kochawaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chawaz|chawaz]] || [[word:chawaz|chawaz]] || [[word:chawaz|chawaz]] || [[word:chawaz|chawaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chawaz|chawaz]] || [[word:chawaz|chawaz]] || [[word:chawaz|chawaz]] || [[word:chawaz|chawaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chawaz|chawaz]] || [[word:chawaz|chawaz]] || [[word:chawaz|chawaz]] || [[word:chawaz|chawaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chawaz|chawaz]] || [[word:chawaz|chawaz]] || [[word:chawaz|chawaz]] || [[word:chawaz|chawaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chawaz|th忙chawaz]] || [[word:j忙chawaz|j忙chawaz]] || [[word:sh忙chawaz|sh忙chawaz]] || [[word:k忙chawaz|k忙chawaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachawaz|thathachawaz]] || [[word:jajachawaz|jajachawaz]] || [[word:shashachawaz|shashachawaz]] || [[word:kakachawaz|kakachawaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachawaz|thachawaz]] || [[word:jachawaz|jachawaz]] || [[word:shachawaz|shachawaz]] || [[word:kachawaz|kachawaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachawaz|thachawaz]] || [[word:jachawaz|jachawaz]] || [[word:shachawaz|shachawaz]] || [[word:kachawaz|kachawaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachawaz|shachawaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachawaz|goshachawaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachawaz|gokishachawaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachawazn眉|shachawazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachawaznkn眉|goshachawaznkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachawazn眉|gokishachawazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachawazsh毛|shachawazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachawaznksh毛|goshachawaznksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachawazsh毛|gokishachawazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachawazro|shachawazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachawaznkro|goshachawaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachawazro|gokishachawazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachawazmu|shachawazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachawaznkmu|goshachawaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachawazmu|gokishachawazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachawazsher|shachawazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachawaznksher|goshachawaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachawazsher|gokishachawazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachawazng|shachawazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachawaznkng|goshachawaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachawazng|gokishachawazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachawazya|shachawazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachawaznkya|goshachawaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachawazya|gokishachawazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachawazyam|shachawazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachawaznkyam|goshachawaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachawazyam|gokishachawazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachawazn眉sh毛|shachawazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachawaznkn眉sh毛|goshachawaznkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachawazn眉sh毛|gokishachawazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachawazn眉ro|shachawazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachawaznkn眉ro|goshachawaznkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachawazn眉ro|gokishachawazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachawazn眉mu|shachawazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachawaznkn眉mu|goshachawaznkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachawazn眉mu|gokishachawazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachawazsh毛n眉|shachawazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachawaznksh毛n眉|goshachawaznksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachawazsh毛n眉|gokishachawazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachawazsh毛ro|shachawazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachawaznksh毛ro|goshachawaznksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachawazsh毛ro|gokishachawazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachawazsh毛mu|shachawazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachawaznksh毛mu|goshachawaznksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachawazsh毛mu|gokishachawazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachawazron眉|shachawazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachawaznkron眉|goshachawaznkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachawazron眉|gokishachawazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachawazrosh毛|shachawazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachawaznkrosh毛|goshachawaznkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachawazrosh毛|gokishachawazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachawazromu|shachawazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachawaznkromu|goshachawaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachawazromu|gokishachawazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachawazmun眉|shachawazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachawaznkmun眉|goshachawaznkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachawazmun眉|gokishachawazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachawazmush毛|shachawazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachawaznkmush毛|goshachawaznkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachawazmush毛|gokishachawazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachawazmuro|shachawazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachawaznkmuro|goshachawaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachawazmuro|gokishachawazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
